title: legal-incident-response output directory schema
description: Specifies the structure of legal-outputs/<timestamp>-incident-<path-type>/ — produced by SP3b legal-incident-response. Audience-shaped 2-file output (legal.md + business.md) with optional handoff-context.json for contract-breach delegation.

legal.md.description: 法務 audience: event record + ISO 8601 §時間軸 + path-specific content (PDPC 通報文 / 函覆 / handoff pointer) + compliance checklist + TBD migration tracker. Min 500 bytes. Must contain '## §時間軸' heading. Must NOT contain Path A anti-patterns (see scripts/grade_response.py PATH_A_ANTIPATTERNS).

business.md.description: 非法務 audience: 1-句 summary + Top 3 即時動作 + deadline 警示 + 對外溝通要點. Min 200 bytes. Must NOT contain Path A anti-patterns.

handoff-context.json.description: Only present for contract-breach path. Soft delegation seed for legal-contract-review. Schema_version locked to 1; 10 required keys.

contract_path.description: Absolute or repo-relative path to the contract under review

breach_type.description: Canonical 民法 § label (§227 不完全給付 / §225 給付不能 / §234 受領遲延 / §229 給付遲延 / §259 解除契約效力)
